bulkText.title: 批量创建测试案例（文字模式）
bulkText.help: 每行一条记录，格式为“编号,标题,前置条件,步骤,预期结果,TCG,优先级,Test Data”。标题后的字段可以留空；内容包含逗号时请使用引号包裹。TCG 字段可留空或使用 | 分隔多个单号；优先级支持 High / Medium / Low（默认 Medium）。可选第 8 列为 test_data JSON 数组（与 Set CSV Export 的 test_data 单元格形状相同，例如 [{"name":"user","category":"email","value":"qa@example.com"}]）；JSON 需用引号包裹并将内部引号改为两个引号。注意：Export 的整行格式与此列序不同，不可整行直接粘贴回来，仅 test_data 单元格可对应第 8 列；test_data 可能含敏感 credential，请注意保护。
bulkText.placeholder:
TC-1001,登录验证,"确认测试账号存在","1. 打开登录页; 2. 输入正确账号密码","显示主控台",TCG-10001,High,"[{""name"":""login_email"",""category"":""email"",""value"":""qa@example.com""},{""name"":""login_password"",""category"":""credential"",""value"":""ChangeMe123!""},{""name"":""retry_limit"",""category"":""number"",""value"":""3""}]"
TC-1002,错误密码流程,,输入错误密码,显示错误信息,,Low
TC-1003,API 健康检查,"服务已启动","发送 GET /health","返回 200",TCG-10003|TCG-10005,Medium,"[{""name"":""health_url"",""category"":""url"",""value"":""https://example.com/health""},{""name"":""expected_status_codes"",""category"":""json"",""value"":""[200,204]""},{""name"":""request_id"",""category"":""identifier"",""value"":""REQ-1001""},{""name"":""checked_at"",""category"":""date"",""value"":""2026-07-20""},{""name"":""fallback_note"",""category"":""other"",""value"":""n/a""},{""name"":""service_name"",""value"":""tcrt-api""}]"
